declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, balls, a cage, grease and seals corresponding to 0.62 Kg.
note: This EPD follows PCR 2023:03 modular structure (Upstream/Core/Downstream) rather than EN 15804 A1-A3/A4/.../C/D columns. No explicit A1-A3 column is given. The reported A1-A3 values here are approximated by summing the Upstream + Core stages (production phase): GWP-fossil 2.16+0.573=2.73; GWP-biogenic -0.0925+(-0.000157)=-0.0927; GWP-total 2.07+0.573=2.64. The whole-life totals (incl. Downstream) are: fossil 2.74, biogenic 0.00, total 2.75 kg CO2 eq. A separate GWP-GHG indicator was not reported.
